title: allocarya australasica
intro: Allocarya australasica, also known as the New Zealand tea tree, is a plant species native to the South Island of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant's leaves have been used in herbal preparations to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Allocarya australasica can be consumed as a tea, infused oil, or tincture to harness its health benefits.
